analysis: The project appears to be a web-based educational site about black holes with multiple deployment targets (test-website, github-page, docs). The existing to-dos indicate incomplete CSS animations, HTML structure, and JavaScript functionality. The theme should focus on black holes with animated objects, slides, and page animations.
